dct_description_sm: Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian.
Appears in: "Atlas minor Gerardi Mercatoris à I. Hondio plurimis aeneis tabulis auctus et illustratus: denuo recognitus, additisque novis delineationibus emendatus," Gerard Mercator, 1628.
Date derived from appears in note.
